nasb.text: When Ephraim spoke, there was trembling. He exalted himself in Israel, But through Baal he did wrong and died.

esv.text: When Ephraim spoke, there was trembling; he was exalted in Israel, but he incurred guilt through Baal and died.

cnv.text: 從前以法蓮一說話，人都戰兢。 他原在以色列中居高位， 但後來因事奉巴力犯了罪，就死了。

ccb.text: 以法莲支派在以色列地位崇高， 他们一开口，人都恐惧颤抖。 但他们却祭拜巴力，自招灭亡。
